note: CA outbound whose 'to' is internal-only with the prospect on cc — must still count as outbound (exclusion computed over to+cc+bcc).

rows.subject: Re: Encord x Hitachi Rail
rows.body_preview: Thanks George. Marcello - was good to meet & would be nice to sneak something in person if we can. My Wednesday morning I can shuffle some meetings around to be free anytime between 9am-11am.  As George mentioned, we're based near Holborn but can travel if helpful, Safe travels & chat soon,

rows.subject: Re: Encord & TRSS
rows.body_preview: Hello all,  Great speaking earlier.  Here are some times next week that work to continue the conversation around the DoW-type use case: Monday, July 20th, 12:30pm - 1pm   Tuesday, July 21st, 11:00am - 11:30am Tuesday, July 21st, 12:30pm - 1pm  All times EST.  Best,  Nico

rows.subject: Re: Adam & Encord
rows.body_preview: Hey Adam - how does your schedule look on Wednesday or Thursday to catch up? Let me know when works or if it's easier, you can book directly on my calendar here (I'm quite double booked this week so may be easier to let me know when works and I can shuffle some things around), Hope had nice weekend

rows.subject: Re: Encord <> Gritt Demo
rows.body_preview: Hi Rishav, Thank you for sending this over. I've loaded the data into a working 3D scene in Encord (the two Livox LiDARs fused with the pick and place detector cameras across all 9 frames; coloring the points by camera imagery looks great). Two things to check so we get the fullest scene in front of

rows.subject: Re: Ambu + Encord
rows.body_preview: Hi Hoddan,  Thank you for reaching out. We’re keen to hear if the re-encode guidance shared by our CS Engineering team helped to resolve those issues.  Regarding the technical sync, I will push our placeholder invite by 2 weeks so we have a provisional date in the calendar. We can easily adjust this

rows.subject: Re: Encord & Midjourney
rows.body_preview: Hi Yousuf,  Hope you are doing well!  I just wanted to follow up and see whether you have had a chance to speak with your colleague and whether he has time this week or next to talk?  Thank you!  Best,  Constantin
